title: Encapsulation, Properties, and Descriptors · Program Brief: Oop Reusable Descriptors
summary: Protect borrower limits, item status, and identifier rules while keeping a small usable public API. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop reusable descriptors increment in an invariant-protecting circulation model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build a descriptor only when repeated managed-attribute behavior outweighs simpler property or composition designs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
